title: Incorrect case folding in the LIKE operator
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_case (id INTEGER IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, value NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
SELECT value FROM test_case WHERE value = 'ね';
SELECT value FROM test_case WHERE value = 'き';
SELECT value FROM test_case WHERE value = NCHAR(0x304d);
key_bug_features: Incorrect case comparison in LIKE operator
